## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "There is no way to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Affected Crate(s)

- [ ] hexa-tune-proto-ffi

Any other context, diagrams, or protocol examples.
